arts.ttl: Adriano: ‘ I adore Inter, I will always adore the club’
arts.sum: Former Inter striker spoke with La Gazzetta dello Sport ahead of the Milan Derby: “I’m organizing my farewell match. And at the Maracana, I’m waiting for my old Nerazzurri teammates…”. The ‘Emperor’ is set to play his final match in the near future, choosing to play one half of the match for Flamengo, the second for Inter. Turning his attention to the upcoming derby, Adriano talked about his memories of the historic matches against Milan: “With Milan, it’s not just a derby, it’s emotion,” says the Brazilian. arts.ttl: Milan considering two-striker formation for derby
arts.sum: AC Milan are reportedly considering a significant tactical shift for the upcoming Milan derby against Inter. Manager Paulo Fonseca is contemplating a move from the usual 4-2-3-1 formation to a 4-4-2 or 4-4-1-1 setup, with Tammy Abraham potentially partnering Alvaro Morata in attack. This change could see three alterations to the lineup that faced Liverpool in the Champions League. Calabria is sidelined with a muscular issue, while Pavlovic and Ruben Loftus-Cheek are also expected to miss out. In their place, Emerson Royal, Gabbia, and Abraham are likely to step in. arts.ttl: Milan boss Paulo Fonseca to face sack in case of heavy defeat to Inter
arts.sum: Milan boss Paulo Fonseca is very likely to be face the sack, if the Rossoneri lose to Inter in the Milan derby in the Serie A later today. There has…

arts.ttl: Albertini: “Leao needs to step up. Milan haven’t deserved wins so far, but the derby….”
arts.sum: Former AC Milan midfielder Demetrio Albertini shared his thoughts on the upcoming Milan derby during the Cupra Padel Tour 2024. Albertini, who played over 500 professional matches and 79 for the national team, spoke with La Gazzetta dello Sport and mixed his analysis as an ex-player with the hopes of a Milan fan looking for a turnaround. When asked about his expectations for the match, Albertini said, “The derby is worth three points like any other match, but it’s pointless to hide that it has a special value. arts.ttl: Inter vs. AC Milan: All eyes on San Siro
arts.sum: Inter have won the last six Milan derbies in all competitions by an aggregate score of 14-2, a record for consecutive wins for the Nerazzurri against the Rossoneri. Marcus Thuram has scored in both of his Serie A appearances against Milan: the only two players to find the net in each of their first three Derby della Madonnina league appearances for Inter in the three points for a win era are Ronaldo (between 1997 and 1998) and Romelu Lukaku (between 2019 and 2020).
